hero.description: Connect directly with verified saree manufacturers across India. No commission, no middlemen, better margins.

how.title: How It Works
how.step1_desc: Manufacturer or wholesaler — create your account in just 2 minutes, completely free.
how.step2_desc: LoomLink directly connects verified manufacturers with wholesalers across India.
how.step3_desc: Deal directly with manufacturers on WhatsApp. Zero brokerage, maximum profit.

why.title: Why LoomLink?
why.p1_desc: Deal directly with manufacturers — zero commission, higher margins.
why.p2_desc: Wholesalers from UP, Bihar and Gujarat can now source directly from verified manufacturers.
why.p3_desc: Verified manufacturers, genuine catalogues, transparent pricing.
